anomalies._r: spherical coordiante r,  location of the anommaly [in stellar radius]
anomalies._theta_r: spherical coordiante theta, location of the anommaly [deg]
anomalies._phi_r: spherical coordiante phi, location of the anommaly [deg]
anomalies._m: strength of the anomally with respect to the global dipol
anomalies._theta_m: spherical coordiante theta, orientation of the anommaly [deg]
anomalies._phi_m,: spherical coordiante phi, orientation of the anommaly [deg]
